description: Perform aperture photometry on a target star in the Messier 12 globular cluster using the image at ~/AstroImages/photometry/m12_Vcomb.fits and coordinates from ~/AstroImages/photometry/target_star.txt. Conduct three measurements using a Source Aperture Radius of 6.0 pixels with varying Sky Annulus settings: Config A (Inner 10, Outer 15), Config B (Inner 10, Outer 25), and Config C (Inner 10, Outer 40). Save the results (Config, Sky_Per_Pixel, Net_Source_Flux) to ~/AstroImages/measurements/annulus_test.csv. Provide a written conclusion in ~/AstroImages/measurements/conclusion.txt identifying which configuration suffers most from neighbor star contamination and which is optimal for this crowded field.
